theme_and_archetype.rationale: For a safety navigation app, especially used at night, dark mode prevents glare and preserves night vision. The Swiss High-Contrast archetype provides extreme clarity, authority, and calmness. It avoids cliché feminine colors (pink) and instead uses highly intentional functional colors (Signal Red, Safety Green) against a Stark White/Deep Black base to build trust without inducing fear.

rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (Banned: Inter, Roboto).
Ensure letter-spacing is tight on headings.
Use explicit contrast for overlines and labels.
Use #ef4444 exclusively for SOS and critical dangers. Do not use red for benign buttons.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Never use pure black; tint with cool blue (zinc) for depth.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, bottom-centric design. Actions must be thumb-reachable.
spacing_and_layout.ui_layer: relative z-10 pointer-events-none flex flex-col justify-end h-[100dvh]
spacing_and_layout.bottom_sheet: pointer-events-auto bg-[#09090b]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-zinc-800 rounded-t-3xl p-6 w-full max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto

grid_system.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Control Room Mode)

glassmorphism.usage: Bottom routing sheets, floating action bars, and overlays.

neumorphism_crisp.usage: Safety score cards and incident report buttons.

map.route_polylines: Weight 6, opacity 0.8. Color depends on safety score (Safe: #10b981, Caution: #f59e0b).

sos_button.design: Massive 64x64px circular button, bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(239,68,68,0.6)] flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg

ai_chatbot_fab.design: Pill-shaped or 56x56px circular button, bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 font-semibold

bottom_navigation.design: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 bg-zinc-950 border-t border-zinc-900 flex justify-around items-center z-40 pointer-events-auto pb-safe

incident_reporting.design: Grid of square buttons for categories. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout. Active state: ring-2 ring-white.

safety_score_cards.design: Horizontal minimalist cards. Example: 'Lighting: Good (Green icon)'. Use crisp borders.

motion.drawer_entrance: slide-up from bottom, spring physics if possible (framer-motion)

icons.usage: Use bold/stroke-2 icons. Map pins should use clear iconography (Shield for safe, AlertTriangle for incident).

images.description: Onboarding screen background showing a well-lit, safe city street at night. Conveys trust and calm.

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons and 'react-leaflet', 'leaflet' for the map.
Implement the UI using a mobile-first approach. Ensure the map takes up the full viewport (100dvh) with absolute/fixed UI layers on top.
The Drawer/Bottom Sheet should house the route search, route details, and safety scores. It must use the glassmorphism surface strategy.
The SOS Button is life-critical: Do not hide it in a menu. It must float above the map and bottom sheet, glowing red.
Load Cabinet Grotesk and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts or local assets in index.html/CSS.
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards for the primary map UI; use raw divs with the defined glassmorphism classes to avoid boxed-in layouts.
For the Admin Dashboard route, use the 'Control Room' grid layout with strict, dense Shadcn components.
